welcome_title: Welcome to the Sternberg Working Memory Task
welcome_p1: This test measures your working memory by asking you to memorize letters and then identify whether a probe letter was part of your memorized set.
welcome_p2: You will see a series of letters shown one at a time. Black letters should be memorized, while green letters should be ignored. After a short delay, a red probe letter will appear and you must decide if it was in your memorized set.
tutorial_step1_text: Letters appear one at a time. Memorize the BLACK letters. Ignore the GREEN letters — do not add them to your mental list.
tutorial_step2_text: After all letters are shown, a dash (—) appears. During this maintenance period, keep rehearsing the black letters in your mind.
tutorial_step3_text: A RED probe letter will appear. Press F if the letter WAS in your memorized set. Press J if the letter was NOT in your memorized set.
tutorial_step4_text: Try to respond as accurately as possible. Each trial has a different number of letters to memorize (3, 5, or 7).
demo_intro: Watch how a single trial works.
demo_step1: First, a fixation cross (+) appears. Focus on the center of the screen.
demo_step2: A BLACK letter appears — memorize it! This is "B".
demo_step3: A GREEN letter appears — ignore it! Do not add "G" to your list.
demo_step4: A dash (—) appears. Keep the memorized letters in mind during this maintenance period.
demo_step5: A RED probe letter appears. Is "B" in your memorized set? Yes! Press F.
demo_step6: Press F if the probe WAS in your set, or J if it was NOT.
demo_step7: You understand how it works. Ready to practice?
practice_complete_text1: Well done! You are ready for the full test.
practice_complete_text2: Remember: memorize BLACK letters, ignore GREEN letters, and respond to the RED probe with F (in set) or J (not in set).
phase_probe: Was this letter in your set? F = Yes, J = No
feedback_timeout: Too slow — try to respond faster
results_chart_title: Mean Reaction Time by Set Size
settings_total_trials_desc: Total trials (must be a multiple of 3 for balanced conditions)
settings_fixation_duration_desc: How long the fixation cross is shown before each trial
settings_letter_duration_desc: How long each letter is displayed
settings_response_window_desc: Maximum time allowed to respond to the probe
footer_description: Sternberg Working Memory Task — measure working memory scanning speed and accuracy.
